name: Mashed Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cold mashed potatoes (plain, no butter, milk, or salt added) and confectioners sugar.
2. Stir in shredded coconut, vanilla, and salt until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into one large pan or two small pans so that the candy is about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Melt baking chocolate in a double boiler over low heat, ensuring no water boils.
5. Pour the melted chocolate over the top of the cooled candy.
6. Allow to cool in the refrigerator.
7. Cut into bite-sized squares. For variation, roll into balls and coat with cinnamon, shape into 1-inch-high cones, or dip the base in chocolate to create little haystacks. Approximately 100 haystacks are yielded.
